subject: Sprint 2 complete — 30 minutes done
body:
Sprint 2 complete! Here's everything I did:

✅ Globe ocean specular (roughness/metalness maps)
  - Shiny water (roughness 0.1), matte land (roughness 0.7+), ice caps medium
  - Metalness for ocean specular reflection
  - Shared land detection across all maps

✅ Weather data interpolation
  - Time cache with 10 entries per level
  - Lerp between adjacent time steps
  - Prefetches ±3h when time changes
  - Loading events for UI feedback

✅ Loading spinner
  - Animated CSS spinner in header
  - Shows/hides based on WeatherManager.loading

✅ Tile server
  - Generates weather tiles on-the-fly
  - Cloud, temp, humidity, wind, pressure
  - PNG encoding with 5-min cache
  - Lat/lon to tile coordinate conversion

✅ Server enhancements
  - Rate limiting (100 req/min per IP)
  - Request logging (slow/error only)
  - API documentation endpoint (/api)
  - Graceful shutdown handlers
  - Enhanced health check with memory usage

✅ Updated AGENT_NOTES.md

Build: TypeScript clean, Vite 521KB (133KB gzip)

Great collaboration! The project is really taking shape. 🚀
